mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_daily_event WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND event_date = #{eventDate}
SELECT * FROM user_daily_event WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY event_date DESC
SELECT * FROM user_daily_event WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY event_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_daily_event SET event_id = #{eventId}, event_date = #{eventDate}, event_type = #{eventType}, event_name = #{eventName}, event_description = #{eventDescription}, impact_type = #{impactType}, impact_value = #{impactValue}, is_applied = #{isApplied} WHERE id = #{id}
